constraint.name: DS_1-7 - FunctionalChains should have a description
DS_1-9 - FunctionalExchanges should have a description
DS_1-11 - ComponentExchanges should have a description
F_1 - Ports on non leaf Functions
constraint.message: Port "{0}" is on non leaf function.
constraint.description: Ports are not allowed on non-leaf functions (meaning that a functional exchange has not been allocated down to a leaf function).

constraint.name: FCH_1 - FunctionalChain involves leaf functions
constraint.message: FunctionalChain"{0}" involves a non leaf function ("{1}").
constraint.description: FunctionalChain should involve only leaf functions.

constraint.name: FC_2 - CE should have at least one allocated FE
constraint.message: ComponentExchange "{0}" should have at least one allocated FE
constraint.description: CE should have at least one allocated FE

constraint.name: FC_3 - FE between components/actors should be allocated to CE
constraint.message: FuntionalExchange "{0}" should be allocated to a ComponentExchange (FE is between different components/actor).
constraint.description: FE between components/actors should be allocated to CE. Note: not tested when connected to an actor whose name contains: 'User' (case-sensitive).

constraint.name: FC_4 - Port with CE should have provided/required Interface
constraint.message: ComponentPort "{0}" has a CE, should have provided/required interface.
constraint.description: Port with CE should have provided/required Interface.

constraint.name: FC_5 - FunctionalExchange allocated to a CE should have one or more Exchanged Items
constraint.message: The FunctionalExchange"{0}" must exchange one or more ExchangeItems.
constraint.description: FunctionalExchange allocated to a CE should have one or more Exchanged Items

constraint.name: FC_6 - FunctionalExchanges on same input port must have same name
constraint.message: The FunctionalExchange"{0}" must have same name as other FunctionalExchanges "{1}" on same input port
constraint.description: FunctionalExchanges on same input port must have the same name.

constraint.name: FC_7 - FunctionalExchanges on same input port must have same EI
constraint.message: The FunctionalExchange"{0}" must have same EI "{2}" as other FunctionalExchanges "{1}" on same input port
constraint.description: FunctionalExchanges on same input port must have the same EI

constraint.name: FC_8 - FunctionalExchanges on same output port must have same name
constraint.message: The FunctionalExchange"{0}" must have same name as other FunctionalExchanges "{1}" on same output port
constraint.description: FunctionalExchanges on same output port must have the same name.

constraint.name: FC_9 - FunctionalExchanges on same output port must have same EI
constraint.message: The FunctionalExchange"{0}" must have same EI "{2}" as other FunctionalExchanges "{1}" on same output port
constraint.description: FunctionalExchanges on same output port must have the same EI

constraint.name: FC_13 - The CE EI shall be the union of the EI of the FE allocated to the CE
constraint.message: ComponentExchange "{0}" has allocated EIs different from it's allocated FunctionalExchange EIs : EI "{1}" is allocated to {2} only
constraint.description: The CE EI shall be the union of the EI of the FE allocated to the CE

constraint.name: FC_14 - FunctionalExchanges incoming with same name must use same port
constraint.message: The FunctionalExchange"{0}" has the same name as another incoming FuntionalExchange. It should be on the same input port.
constraint.description: Incoming FunctionalExchanges on same input port must have the same name.

constraint.name: FC_15 - FunctionalExchanges outgoing with same name must use same port
constraint.message: The FunctionalExchange"{0}" has the same name as another outgoing FuntionalExchange. It should be on the same output port.
constraint.description: Outgoing FunctionalExchanges on same output port must have the same name.
